---
title: multiline-if-init
description: "Move multiline if initializers above conditions."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Move multiline if initializers above conditions. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if value, err :=
	load(); err != nil { return err }
```

## Good

```go
value, err := load()
if err != nil { return err }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only multiline-if-init`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
